channel.title: The K-Beauty Data Desk
channel.description: I read all the reviews so you don't have to. Honest, data-backed takes on Korea's best-selling skincare.

item.title: Anua PDRN Hyaluronic Acid Hydra Capsule Mist: What 5,559 Real Reviews Actually Say (2026)
item.description: Anua PDRN Hyaluronic Acid Hydra Capsule Mist: 4.6★ from 5,559 Korean reviews (75% five-star). Who it suits, who should skip, and where to buy.
